sections.paragraph:
Original: גּעתּם

Transliteration: ga‛tâm

Phonetic: gah-tawm'

BDB Definition:

Gatam = "a burnt valley"
  1. fourth son of Eliphaz and grandson of Esau and one of the dukes of Eliphaz

Origin: of uncertain derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
